body:
## Rationale
Each `/technique/<slug>` page defines a specific drumming technique (blast beat, double bass, gravity blast, polyrhythm, etc.). The current SSR handler emits `Article` schema (via #1202) and FAQPage (via #1310). But **technique pages are definitional** — they answer 'what is X?' which maps to `DefinedTerm` schema (https://schema.org/DefinedTerm).

DefinedTerm is specifically designed for glossary/encyclopedia entries. Adding it:
- Helps AI models anchor the term entity when answering 'what is a blast beat?'
- Provides a `termCode` and `inDefinedTermSet` that LLMs use for entity disambiguation
- Distinct from Article (general content) and FAQPage (Q&A format) — adds a third entity node

## Files to touch
- `api/meta/[...path].js` — update the `/technique/<slug>` handler (lines ~479–505) to add a second `@graph` node with DefinedTerm alongside existing Article

## DefinedTerm schema shape
```json
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@graph": [
    {
      "@type": "Article",
      "headline": "...",
      ... // existing Article node
    },
    {
      "@type": "DefinedTerm",
      "@id": "https://metalforge.io/technique/{slug}#term",
      "name": "{technique.title}",
      "description": "{technique.description}",
      "url": "https://metalforge.io/technique/{slug}",
      "inDefinedTermSet": {
        "@type": "DefinedTermSet",
        "@id": "https://metalforge.io/techniques#termset",
        "name": "Metal Drumming Techniques Glossary",
        "url": "https://metalforge.io/techniques"
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

## Status
ALREADY SHIPPED — fix landed in PR #1682 (commit 82d055a). The `/technique/<slug>` handler in `api/meta/[...path].js` already emits a `@graph` array with both Article and DefinedTerm nodes. No further action needed.
title: SEO batch: Technique pages — add DefinedTerm JSON-LD schema for AI technique-definition queries (~10 techniques)
